gdprCompliance.strategy: All fields use RFC-2606 reserved domains (@example.com), NANP fictional phone prefixes (555-01xx), obviously synthetic names, and non-attributable dates. No real person can be identified from this data.

verifiedFields.email: Uses @example.com (IANA reserved, RFC 2606) — not routable, not real
verifiedFields.password: Synthetic test strings — not reused from any breach corpus
verifiedFields.lastName: Suffixed with ordinal identifiers — clearly non-real
verifiedFields.dateOfBirth: Arbitrary dates with no link to real individuals
verifiedFields.phone: +1-555-01xx range reserved by NANP for fictional use

datasets.description: Happy path — all required and optional fields provided
Happy path — only required fields, no optional fields
Boundary — password at exact minimum length (8 chars)
Edge case — unicode characters in name fields
Edge case — very long password and name values
